sevenDayForecast.headline: A tropical low (14U) may form east of the Solomon Islands, and has a moderate chance of developing into a tropical cyclone.
points: A tropical low (14U) may form late this week east of the Solomon Islands, and initially east of the Australian area of responsibility.
From the weekend there is a low chance that the tropical low (14U) will develop into a tropical cyclone, and this increases to a Moderate chance from Tuesday next week.
From late weekend or early next week the tropical low (14U) may be moving into the Australian area of responsibility.
It is likely that tropical low (14U) will remain in the far eastern Coral Sea for at least the next 7 days.
